title: fix: expand trustedOrigins to unblock key generation
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Unlocking the hive
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky bug that was blocking some users from generating API keys. The gates are open, go grab your keys and start building!
gist.summary: Expanded the trusted origins configuration in our authentication service to resolve 'Invalid origin' errors during API key generation.
gist.impact: Users can now successfully generate API keys from the main website and local development environments without encountering origin errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing API key generation and authentication (trusted origins). Visual symbols: keys, locks, gates. Let's have Polly the bee holding a shiny golden pixel-art key, unlocking a glowing lime green gate or chest.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a shiny golden key, unlocking a glowing lime green (#ecf874) digital gate in a lush garden. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
